reviews.comment:
Tomo cada día mi cafecito es riquísimo y las chicas un encanto! Es mi relax cotidiano! Recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
I have my coffee there every day, it's delicious and the girls are lovely! It's my daily relaxation! I highly recommend it.

reviews.comment:
Atención  mucho que desear. No quisieron hacer la factura A

(Translated by Google)
The service leaves much to be desired. They refused to issue an invoice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWOUxqX0hnEAE

reviews.comment:
Fuimos a comer y pedimos dos pizetas. La cajera muy poco cordial y nada atenta. Pasamos luego por combustible y no se hacerco ningún playero para saber que necesitábamos, nos fuimos a cargar a otra estación donde nos atendieron como corresponde.

(Translated by Google)
We went to eat and ordered two pizzas. The cashier was very unfriendly and inattentive. We then went to get gas, and no one approached us to find out what we needed. We went to another station to fill up, where we were served accordingly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsNi1xQlp3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amable el personal q me permitió pasar al sanitario sin haber comprado nada y supo guiarme con exactitud a mi parada de transporte interurbano

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very kind; they allowed me to use the restroom without having bought anything and were able to guide me exactly to my intercity transport stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10008655591986199097/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsby1QNTJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
